tours.title: First-Boot Walkthrough
tours.description: Narrated walkthrough of the first-run wizard: CAN scan, ECU pick, Wi-Fi join.

tours.title: 60-Second Quick Walkthrough
tours.description: Marketing-grade condensed wizard tour — under a minute.

tours.title: Wi-Fi, Hotspot & OTA
tours.description: The full multi-SSID manager — Client vs Hotspot, saved networks, Start-on-Boot, the QR-code shortcut, and the OTA update path.

tours.title: Reading the Dashboard
tours.description: Every widget on the default layout — RPM bar, indicators, panels, bars, warnings — plus the three on-device gestures.

tours.title: Menu & Device Settings
tours.description: Reach the menu, then walk every section of Device Settings — CAN, Network, Display, Logging, Diagnostics, and the Wizard rerun.

tours.title: Display, Dimmer & Night Mode
tours.description: Brightness, the CAN-driven auto-dimmer, and Night Mode's three trigger paths plus per-widget overrides.

tours.title: Data Logging & Replay
tours.description: SD card CSV logging at 1–200 Hz, peak hold, and the offline signal replayer.

tours.title: Peak Hold — All-Time Highs
tours.description: Silent peak/min tracking on every signal, the live table, and per-widget peak labels.

tours.title: Editing a Widget
tours.description: Long-press to open the config modal — CAN signal binding, presets, custom CAN IDs, alerts, and the save flow.

tours.title: Custom CAN Signals
tours.description: Hand-enter CAN ID, bit position, length, scale, offset and endianness — for ECUs not yet in the preset list. Plus the DBC import shortcut.
